hero.title: I build AI systems that automate real operations.
hero.description: I combine FullStack + Data + AI to take products from idea to production with measurable impact. I work with NestJS, Next.js, TypeScript, Python, Airflow, OpenAI and AWS.
hero.sideDescription: I do not just ship features: I design systems where backend, frontend, data and AI work as one unit, with type-safe architecture and operational focus.

about.title: AI-driven systems, type-safe architecture and product work with measurable impact.
about.description: I am a full stack engineer specialized in AI systems and data pipelines. I design architectures where artificial intelligence is not a feature, but the operational core of the system.

highlight.title: FullStack + Data + AI to take products from idea to production.

Python + Airflow for pipelines and orchestration

items.title: Production AI, not experimental
items.description: I design systems where AI is tied to real operational workflows, especially in conversational automation, support and process execution.

items.title: Backend and data rigor

items.title: Proven impact

work.title: Selected case studies that show both interface craft and systems depth.

items.title: Handbook AI Workflow Automation
items.summary: A workflow product that turns business processes into executable tasks where people and AI systems can collaborate, track progress and move operational work forward.

detailItems.label: Problem
detailItems.value: Teams need software that does more than display tasks. It must understand processes, route work and maintain traceability across people and AI.

detailItems.label: My role
detailItems.value: I work across product architecture, LLM systems and interface design that turns complex operational flows into more actionable software.

detailItems.label: Why it matters
detailItems.value: This is the strongest portfolio piece for product thinking, systems design, real automation and AI software beyond chat demos.

highlights: Positions the profile around systems work, AI automation and product engineering.
Shows a strong mix of visual storytelling, traceability and full-stack execution.
Can carry both a product walkthrough and still images from dashboards, builders or orchestration views.

media.label: Primary video
media.title: Walkthrough of the AI operating system
media.note: Ideal for a narrated demo showing the builder, tasks, follow-up and coordination between humans and agents.

media.label: Supporting image
media.title: Flow, builder or dashboard still
media.note: A strong slot for a key screenshot when you want to reinforce structure, traceability or product UX.
media.alt: Screenshot of the Handbook flow, builder or dashboard

items.title: LLM Support Automation at Nanti
items.summary: A full-stack conversational module built with Nest.js, Angular and the OpenAI API to operate real support flows through WhatsApp and tawk.io.

detailItems.label: Problem
detailItems.value: Operational support needed faster responses and more automation without losing control or clarity around what the system was doing.

detailItems.label: My role
detailItems.value: I designed and shipped the full-stack integration across frontend, backend and the OpenAI API using more resilient, type-safe patterns.

detailItems.label: Impact
detailItems.value: The system automated 40% of support actions and improved frontend efficiency inside a workflow already tied to the business.

highlights: A strong case for showing production AI rather than prototypes.
Connects Nest.js, Angular and real operational channels clearly.
A good candidate for one short demo plus one or two supporting screenshots.

media.label: Primary video
media.title: Conversational module flow
media.note: Designed for a short recording that shows interaction, automation behavior and operational response inside the product.

media.label: Supporting image
media.title: Panel or conversation state
media.note: Useful for documenting the UI, flow states or visual evidence when the video does not tell the whole story.
media.alt: Screenshot of the panel or conversation state in Nanti

items.title: Data Pipelines for Analytics at Agora
items.summary: Backend services, critical Python/Airflow DAGs, API integrations and frontend work with measurable gains in performance, SEO and reliability.

detailItems.label: Problem
detailItems.value: Teams depend on reliable data and analytics, so the pipelines and services behind them cannot be fragile.

detailItems.label: My role
detailItems.value: I maintained critical DAGs, supported backend architecture with API integrations and contributed to more scalable frontend systems.

detailItems.label: Results
detailItems.value: I reduced initial load time by 20%, cut production errors by 25% and increased organic traffic by 15% while strengthening the product's analytics foundation.

highlights: Reduced initial load time by 20% through a scalable Next.js + Tailwind component library.
Cut production errors by 25% with TypeScript, Redux and type-safe architecture.
Increased organic traffic by 15% while keeping analytics available through Python and Airflow ETL.

media.label: Primary image
media.title: Pipeline, DAG or analytics dashboard
media.note: Use this slot for screenshots of the pipeline, a system architecture or any view that represents the workflow.
media.alt: Screenshot of a pipeline, DAG or analytics dashboard at Agora

media.label: Secondary image
media.title: Related component or interface view
media.note: Helpful for showing that the work was not only data-focused, but also connected to product and interface systems.
media.alt: Screenshot of a related interface connected to the Agora system

items.title: Secure Digital Voting System
items.summary: A digital voting platform with stronger authentication, identity validation and anti-fraud controls for a sensitive process.

detailItems.label: Problem
detailItems.value: The voting process required trustworthy digital participation with strong controls for authentication, identity and duplicate prevention.

detailItems.label: My role
detailItems.value: I built the flow with 2FA, camera validation, voter ID photo matching and logic to protect the process against fraud.

detailItems.label: Why it stands out
detailItems.value: Even if it is not the most modern stack, this case shows ownership, security thinking and the ability to solve a high-sensitivity real-world problem.

highlights: Excellent piece for demonstrating security thinking and identity validation.
Adds range to the portfolio because not everything revolves around AI.
Best presented with key flow screenshots rather than a long narrated demo.

media.label: Primary image
media.title: Authentication and validation flow
media.note: A strong place for screenshots of login, camera verification or identity checks.
media.alt: Screenshot of the authentication and validation flow in the voting system

media.label: Secondary image
media.title: Key screens from the voting system
media.note: Useful for documenting the voting experience, duplicate prevention or any state inside the protected process.
media.alt: Screenshot of key screens from the secure voting system

experience.title: Real experience across AI systems, data pipelines and product software.
experience.description: Updated against the LinkedIn profile export generated on April 20, 2026, so the landing reflects the current trajectory instead of an older approximation.

items.summary: Product Architecture & LLM Systems for software that models, tracks and automates complex operational workflows.
Built backend services, maintained critical Airflow DAGs and shipped frontend improvements with measurable gains in performance, SEO and reliability.
Short-term freelance collaboration focused on product delivery and custom software implementation.
Designed and implemented a conversational system with OpenAI, Nest.js and Angular, automating 40% of support operations and improving frontend efficiency.
Delivered Next.js modules and Node.js/Express APIs for a pharmacy e-commerce flow, reducing form abandonment by 12% and handling 1000+ daily requests.

process.title: From the real operational bottleneck to a system that can hold in production.
process.description: The workflow reflected in the actual profile: identify the operational problem, design a system instead of an isolated feature and measure impact with concrete outcomes.

items.title: Find the real bottleneck
items.description: I start by isolating what is actually slowing the operation down, whether it lives in support, analytics, backend, UI or the handoff between teams and systems.

items.title: Design the system, not just the surface
items.description: The best solutions combine type-safe architecture, thoughtful product flows and integrations that can actually support real usage.

items.title: Ship with measurable impact
items.description: The goal is not only to release, but to leave behind a system that automates, reduces errors, improves performance and can be operated with confidence.

outcomes.title: Proven impact in support, stability, performance and conversion.
outcomes.description: The exported profile and the rest of your work history converge on the same signal: real automation, fewer errors, faster product delivery and stronger business outcomes.
